verifyEmail.subject: Welcome to {appName} - Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email Address
verifyEmail.intro: Thank you for signing up! We're excited to have you on board. Please verify your email address to activate your account and get started.
verifyEmail.helpInstructions: Copy and paste this link into your browser:
verifyEmail.footerLine1: This email was sent to you because you signed up for {appName}.
verifyEmail.footerLine2: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.

resetPassword.subject: Reset Your Password - {appName}
resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.intro: We received a request to reset your password for your account. Click the button below to create a new password:
resetPassword.securityNoticeExpiry: This link will expire in {expiresIn} for your security.
resetPassword.securityNoticeIgnore: If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email and your password will remain unchanged.
resetPassword.helpInstructions: Copy and paste this link into your browser:
resetPassword.footerLine1: This is an automated security email from {appName}.
resetPassword.footerLine2: For security reasons, we never ask for your password via email.

otpVerification.subject: {otp} is your verification code - {appName}
otpVerification.title: Your verification code
otpVerification.intro: Enter this code to verify your identity:
otpVerification.ignoreNotice: If you didn't request this code, you can safely ignore this email.
otpVerification.footerLine1: This is an automated email from {appName}.

teamInvitation.subject: You've been invited to join {teamName} on {appName}
teamInvitation.title: You're Invited!
teamInvitation.bodyIntro: {inviterName} has invited you to join the team {teamName} as a {role}.
teamInvitation.bodyAction: Click the button below to accept the invitation and join the team:
teamInvitation.detailsCreateAccount: If you don't have an account yet, you'll be able to create one when you accept.
teamInvitation.helpInstructions: Copy and paste this link into your browser:
teamInvitation.footerUnexpected: If you didn't expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.
